manifest.name: WatchLog

name: WatchLog

releases.author: Shynkro
releases.description:
## [2.1.0] - 2026-06-17

### Added
- **Open note button** - a new file-text icon in the title detail modal opens the title's `.md` note directly in Obsidian. Available in both the Watchlist and Reading (Books + Manga) modals.
- **Mobile toolbar toggle** - on mobile, a chevron button collapses the action buttons behind a toggle so the search bar stays usable by default. Search ↔ actions swap with a crossfade. Added to both the Watchlist and Reading tabs.
- **"Season watched" log event** - ticking an entire season now records a single summary "Season X watched" entry in the Log, but only when that action completes the season.
- **Add chooser modal** - the "+ add" button now opens a small chooser offering "Add from URL" and "Add manually / via API", consolidating the two add paths into one entry point (desktop and mobile).

### Fixed
- Reading titles not appearing on mobile.
releases.name: v2.1.0 - Minor fixes and changes

releases.author: Shynkro
releases.description:
## What's Changed

## WatchLog 2.0.0

The biggest update yet - WatchLog now tracks **books and manga** alongside your watchlist, with a brand-new reading system, a unified activity log, and a poster-driven Cards view.

### Highlights

**Reading tab (new)**
Track Books and Manga independently from your watchlist - covers, progress (pages/chapters/volumes), ratings, custom fields, auto-generated notes with a Favorite Quotes section, and API lookups via Google Books and Jikan.

**Cards view**
A responsive poster grid for the Watchlist, now the default view, with artwork auto-fetched from Jikan, TMDB, Google Books, and OMDb.

**Community ratings**
See IMDb, MAL, AniList, or TMDB scores next to your own star rating, with automatic refresh.

**Log tab (new)**
A unified, day-grouped timeline of everything you watch and read, with color-coded actions and a source filter.

**Skip Episodes**
Mark fillers and recaps per season so they're excluded from your progress - define them right in the season syntax.

**Reading everywhere**
Books and manga now flow into the Dashboard, Upcoming, and Custom Lists too.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Shynkro/watchlog-obsidian-plugin/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: v2.0.0 - Reading Tab, Log Tab, Cards style
